title: Automation Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger automation design foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Automation Design Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Automation Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good automation design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Automation Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
